Taillow

In: Pokédex
Taillow
Type Normal Flying
National Dex #276
Location
  • Route 5 (tall grass)
  • Route 5 Raid Den (1 star)
Abilities Guts Ups Attack if suffering.
Scrappy Moves hit Ghost-type Pok\emon.
Egg Groups Flying
Wild Held Items Charti Berry (5% chance)

Evolution Line

Pokémon Acquire At
Taillow Base form
Swellow Level 22
